data.title: feat: skills/ — shared agent skills registry
data.description:
## Summary

Project-level (or household-level) skills that any Claude Code agent can load — with a registry for discovery.

## What

```
skills/
├── skill-registry.json         # index of all available skills
├── skill-registry-schema.json  # schema for registry entries
├── manifest-schema.json        # schema for individual skill manifests
└── <skill-name>/
    ├── manifest.json
    ├── SKILL.md
    ├── README.md
    └── patterns/
```

Existing skills: `api-design`, `java-best-practices`, `typescript-best-practices`, `testing-strategies`, `conductor-methodology`.

## Notes

* Skills here are shared across agents, unlike agent-private skills in `~/.claude/skills/`
* Registry enables discovery without reading every skill file
